skill.name: maxhub-lemon8
skill.description: Lemon8 content data query assistant. Covers search, discover, post details, user info, comments, topics, and trending. Supports English and Chinese.
skill.summary: Lemon8 data assistant for content search, user analysis, and trend discovery via the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis found 208 potential issues across 7 files (780 lines). All findings are FALSE POSITIVES after AI review. The skill is a legitimate API client for Lemon8 content data via the MaxHub API at aconfig.cn. Network requests target a single documented API endpoint. Environment variable access retrieves a user-provided API key for Bearer token authentication. External command references (curl) appear in markdown code blocks as API usage documentation and instructions. No obfuscation, data exfiltration, or malicious intent detected. The heuristic critical finding for capability combination is dismissed as legitimate API client behavior. Risk level is LOW; the skill is safe to publish with standard API client warnings.

medium_findings.title: Dangerous Capability Combination (Dismissed)
medium_findings.description: The static analyzer detected a combination of network access, environment variable access, and external command usage. This finding is DISMISSED after AI review: the skill is a transparent API client that legitimately requires all three capabilities. Network access targets a single documented API endpoint (aconfig.cn). Environment access retrieves a user-provided API key for Bearer token authentication. External commands (curl) are standard HTTP client instructions. No evidence of data exfiltration or malicious intent.

low_findings.title: External Commands in Documentation (False Positive)
low_findings.description: 118 instances of shell backtick execution were detected across reference documentation and README files. All instances are FALSE POSITIVES: they appear exclusively in markdown code blocks as curl command examples for API usage. These are documentation and usage instructions, not executable code injection. The skill instructs the AI to construct similar curl commands for legitimate API calls against the documented MaxHub API endpoints.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm References (False Positive)
low_findings.description: 22 instances of weak cryptographic algorithm were detected in API reference files. These are FALSE POSITIVES: the flagged lines contain markdown table formatting, parameter names, and description text. No cryptographic operations, hashing, or encryption are performed by this skill. Reference documentation describes API parameters, not code logic.

content.user_title: Query Lemon8 content data with MaxHub API
content.value_statement: Lemon8 content creators and marketers need quick access to search, discover, and user data. This skill lets you query Lemon8 content data through the MaxHub API without writing code.
actual_capabilities: Search Lemon8 posts, users, and hashtags with filtering and pagination support
Retrieve post details, comments, and user profiles from Lemon8
Fetch discover page content including banners, tabs, and trending topics
Extract post and user IDs from Lemon8 share links for batch lookups
Query hot search keywords and topic information for trend analysis
Support both English and Chinese language responses with localized formatting
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key configured as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable
Only supports Lemon8 platform data; does not work with other social media platforms
Data recency depends on the MaxHub API cache refresh cycle; may not be real-time
Read-only access to public data; cannot create, update, or delete Lemon8 content

use_cases.title: Social Media Trend Research
use_cases.description: Search and analyze trending content on Lemon8 to identify popular topics, hashtags, and content patterns for market research.
use_cases.target_user: Market researchers and social media analysts

use_cases.title: Content Performance Analysis
use_cases.description: Retrieve post details, comments, and engagement data to evaluate content performance and audience response on Lemon8.

use_cases.title: Audience and Competitor Research
use_cases.description: Look up user profiles, follower lists, and following patterns to understand audience demographics and competitor strategies on Lemon8.
use_cases.target_user: Digital marketing professionals and brand managers

prompt_templates.title: Basic Keyword Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Lemon8 for posts about [topic/keyword]. Show me the top results with their engagement metrics.
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple keyword-based content search on Lemon8

prompt_templates.title: User Profile Lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: Look up Lemon8 user [username or share link] and show me their profile information including follower count, following count, and bio description.
prompt_templates.scenario: Retrieving a specific users profile data

prompt_templates.title: Post Analysis with Comments
prompt_templates.prompt: Get details for Lemon8 post [share link or ID] including all available comments. Summarize the content and the overall sentiment of the comments.
prompt_templates.scenario: Detailed post analysis with community feedback review

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Source Trend Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze current trending topics on Lemon8. Search for hot keywords, check discover page banners, and provide a comprehensive trend report with top hashtags and content categories.
prompt_templates.scenario: Cross-endpoint deep analysis for comprehensive trend research

output_examples.input: Search Lemon8 for trending lifestyle content
output_examples.output: Found 15 trending lifestyle posts on Lemon8. The top results include: 5 Morning Routine Tips with 12.3K likes, Minimalist Home Decor Ideas with 8.7K likes, and Weekend Meal Prep Guide with 6.2K likes. Most popular categories are home decor, wellness, and recipes.

output_examples.input: Get profile and recent posts for Lemon8 user lilychen
output_examples.output: User lilychen has 24.5K followers and follows 1.2K accounts. Bio: Lifestyle content creator sharing beauty tips and travel diaries. Recent top post: Summer Skincare Routine with 15.6K likes and 342 comments. Most active posting time is weekends.

best_practices: Provide specific keywords or share links for accurate search results
Use pagination parameters to browse through large result sets
Combine search, user profile, and post detail queries for comprehensive analysis
anti_patterns: Requesting sensitive data like API keys or authentication credentials through the chat
Assuming the data includes private or non-public content from Lemon8
Making repetitive queries without pagination, which may hit rate limits

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: This skill helps you query Lemon8 content data through the MaxHub API, including search results, discover pages, post details, user profiles, comments, topics, and trending keywords.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need to register at www.aconfig.cn and create an API key. Configure it as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable before using the skill.

faq.question: What kind of data can I access?
faq.answer: You can access Lemon8 public content data including posts, user profiles, comments, search results, discover page content, trending keywords, and topic information.

faq.question: Can I analyze multiple posts at the same time?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill supports batch operations for extracting post and user IDs from multiple share links. You can also run multiple independent queries in parallel.

faq.question: Is the data from the API real-time?
faq.answer: Data recency depends on the MaxHub API cache. Some data may have a slight delay. The API response includes cache information you can reference.

faq.question: Does this skill work with other social media platforms?
faq.answer: No. This skill is designed exclusively for Lemon8 content data through the MaxHub API. It does not support other platforms.
